steps.instruction: Learn how to boil water: Fill a pot with water and place it on the stove on high heat.
Practice sautéing: Heat oil in a pan and add chopped vegetables, stirring frequently.
Understand seasoning: Taste your food and adjust salt, pepper, and herbs accordingly.
Master the art of draining: Use a colander to drain pasta or vegetables after boiling.
Experiment with tasting and adjusting flavors as you cook.
